text:
is the 3rd episode of the 1st season and the 3rd and final episode overall of the Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi web miniseries, produced by .

Overview

 Amongst the ranks of the new rookie soldiers, two excellent cadets stand out - Fukushi and Lil. Lil's parents were eaten by Titans, a motivation she uses in her training every day in order to defeat them. Fukushi is attracted to Lil's determination, however his feelings are not returned. As the days pass, the pair try to fight their growing feelings, and a fierce battle soon develops.
